dividends.evidence_text: dividend distribution. perundang-undangan di Indonesia dan Anggaran Dasar Perseroan, In accordance with the laws and regulations in Indonesia and keputusan mengenai pembagian dividen ditetapkan melalui the Company’s Articles of Association, decisions regarding the persetujuan pemegang saham pada RUPS tahunan berdasarkan distribution of dividends are determined through shareholder rekomendasi dari Direksi Perseroan. approval at the annual GMS based on recommendations from the Company’s Board of Directors. Perseroan dapat membagian dividen pada tahun dimana Perseroan mencatatkan laba bersih. Direksi Perseroan Company can distribute dividends in the year in which the menetapkan kebijakan pembagian dividen kepada pemegang Company recorded a net profit. The Company’s Board of Directors saham Perseroan dengan mempertimbangkan faktor-faktor determines the dividend distribution policy to the Company’s antara lain shareholders by considering the following factors 1. tingkat kesehatan keuangan Perseroan; 2. posisi permodalan Perseroan; 1. the level of financial soundness of the Company; 3. target dan proyeksi kecukupan modal di masa depan; 2. the Company’s capital position; 4. kepatuhan terhadap peraturan yang berlaku; 3. targets and projections of future capital adequacy; 5. rencana dan prospek usaha Perseroan di masa depan; 4. compliance with applicable regulations; 6. hal-hal lain yang dipandang relevan oleh Direksi Perseroan. 5. the Company’s business plans and prospects in the future; 6. other matters deemed relevant by the Company’s Board of Directors. Mengingat kinerja keuangan tahun 2023 dan 2024 yang masih terkoreksi, perseroan memutuskan untuk tidak membagikan Given the financial performance in 2023 and 2024 which is still dividen. being corrected, the company has decided not to distribute dividends.
